revision.comment: 新しいページ: ''''御田舞'''（おんだまい） *[[和歌山県]][[伊都郡]][[かつらぎ町]]花園梁瀬に伝わる[[重要無形民俗文化財]]の民俗芸能。[[花園の御田...'
revision.text:
'''御田舞'''（おんだまい） *[[和歌山県]][[伊都郡]][[かつらぎ町]]花園梁瀬に伝わる[[重要無形民俗文化財]]の民俗芸能。[[花園の御田舞]]を参照。 *和歌山県[[有田郡]][[有田川町]]杉野原に伝わる重要無形民俗文化財の民俗芸能。[[杉野原の御田舞]]を参照。
{{aimai}}

'''御田舞'''（おんだまい） *[[和歌山県]][[伊都郡]][[かつらぎ町]]花園梁瀬に伝わる[[重要無形民俗文化財]]の民俗芸能。[[花園の御田舞]]を参照。 *和歌山県[[有田郡]][[有田川町]]杉野原に伝わる重要無形民俗文化財の民俗芸能。[[杉野原の御田舞]]を参照。 *[[佐賀県]][[神埼市]][[神埼町]]に伝わる県[[重要無形民俗文化財]]の[[仁比山神社|民俗芸能「御田舞」]]。 *[[佐賀県]][[鳥栖市]]蔵上町に伝わる県[[重要無形民俗文化財]]の四阿屋神社の御田舞。
{{aimai}} {{デフォルトソート:おんたまい}}

'''御田舞'''（おんだまい） *[[和歌山県]][[伊都郡]][[かつらぎ町]]花園梁瀬に伝わる[[重要無形民俗文化財]]の民俗芸能。[[花園の御田舞]]を参照。 *和歌山県[[有田郡]][[有田川町]]杉野原に伝わる重要無形民俗文化財の民俗芸能。[[杉野原の御田舞]]を参照。 *[[佐賀県]][[神埼市]][[神埼町]]に伝わる県[[重要無形民俗文化財]]の[[仁比山神社|民俗芸能「御田舞」]]。 *[[佐賀県]][[鳥栖市]]蔵上町に伝わる県[[重要無形民俗文化財]]の四阿屋神社（あずまやじんじゃ）の御田舞。
{{aimai}} {{デフォルトソート:おんたまい}}

'''御田舞'''（おんだまい） *[[和歌山県]][[伊都郡]][[かつらぎ町]]花園梁瀬に伝わる[[重要無形民俗文化財]]の民俗芸能。[[花園の御田舞]]を参照。 *和歌山県[[有田郡]][[有田川町]]杉野原に伝わる重要無形民俗文化財の民俗芸能。[[杉野原の御田舞]]を参照。 *[[佐賀県]][[神埼市]][[神埼町]]に伝わる県[[重要無形民俗文化財]]の[[仁比山神社|民俗芸能「御田舞」]]。 *[[佐賀県]][[鳥栖市]]蔵上町に伝わる県[[重要無形民俗文化財]]の[[四阿屋神社]]（あずまやじんじゃ）の御田舞。
{{aimai}} {{デフォルトソート:おんたまい}}

Created page with "```plaintext '''Onta-mai''' (御田舞) * {{ill|Hanazono Onta-mai|en|花園の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Hanazono Yanase, {{ill|Katsuragi, Wakayama|en|かつらぎ町}}, {{ill|Ito District, Wakayama|en|伊都郡}}, Wakayama Prefecture. Designated as an Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property of Japan. * {{ill|Suginohara Onta-mai|en|杉野原の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Suginohara, {{ill|Aridagawa, Wakayama|en|有田川町}}, {{ill|Arida Distric..."
revision.text:
```plaintext '''Onta-mai''' (御田舞) * {{ill|Hanazono Onta-mai|en|花園の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Hanazono Yanase, {{ill|Katsuragi, Wakayama|en|かつらぎ町}}, {{ill|Ito District, Wakayama|en|伊都郡}}, Wakayama Prefecture. Designated as an Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property of Japan. * {{ill|Suginohara Onta-mai|en|杉野原の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Suginohara, {{ill|Aridagawa, Wakayama|en|有田川町}}, {{ill|Arida District, Wakayama|en|有田郡}}, Wakayama Prefecture. Designated as an Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property of Japan. * {{ill|Nihiyama Shrine Onta-mai|en|仁比山神社の御田舞}} - A folk performance from {{ill|Kanzaki, Saga|en|神埼市}}, Kanzaki Town, Saga Prefecture. Designated as a Prefectural Intangible Cultural Property. See {{ill|Nihiyama Shrine|en|仁比山神社}}. * {{ill|Azayama Shrine Onta-mai|en|四阿屋神社の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Kuraue Town, {{ill|Tosu, Saga|en|鳥栖市}}, Saga Prefecture. Designated as a Prefectural Intangible Cultural Property. See {{ill|Azayama Shrine|en|四阿屋神社}}.
== Related Topics == * {{ill|Onta|en|御田}}, {{ill|Ta-asobi|en|田遊び}}
{{Ambiguous}} [[Category:Onta-mai]] [[Category:Japanese folk performing arts]] [[Category:Important Intangible Folk Cultural Properties of Japan]] [[Category:Cultural Properties of Saga Prefecture]] [[Category:Cultural Properties of Wakayama Prefecture]] ```

'''Onta-mai''' (御田舞) * {{ill|Hanazono Onta-mai|ja|花園の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Hanazono Yanase, {{ill|Katsuragi, Wakayama|ja|かつらぎ町}}, {{ill|Ito District, Wakayama|ja|伊都郡}}, Wakayama Prefecture. Designated as an Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property of Japan. * {{ill|Suginohara Onta-mai|ja|杉野原の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Suginohara, {{ill|Aridagawa, Wakayama|ja|有田川町}}, {{ill|Arida District, Wakayama|ja|有田郡}}, Wakayama Prefecture. Designated as an Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property of Japan. * {{ill|Nihiyama Shrine Onta-mai|ja|仁比山神社の御田舞}} - A folk performance from {{ill|Kanzaki, Saga|ja|神埼市}}, Kanzaki Town, Saga Prefecture. Designated as a Prefectural Intangible Cultural Property. See {{ill|Nihiyama Shrine|ja|仁比山神社}}. * {{ill|Azayama Shrine Onta-mai|ja|四阿屋神社の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Kuraue Town, {{ill|Tosu, Saga|ja|鳥栖市}}, Saga Prefecture. Designated as a Prefectural Intangible Cultural Property. See {{ill|Azayama Shrine|ja|四阿屋神社}}.
== See Also == * {{ill|Onta|ja|御田}}, {{ill|Ta-asobi|ja|田遊び}}
{{Ambiguous}}

Designated as an Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property of Japan. * {{ill|Nihiyama Shrine Onta-mai|ja|仁比山神社の御田舞}} - A folk performance from {{ill|Kanzaki, Saga|ja|神埼市}}, Kanzaki Town, Saga Prefecture. '''Onta-mai''' (御田舞) * {{ill|Hanazono Onta-mai|ja|花園の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Hanazono Yanase, {{ill|Katsuragi, Wakayama|ja|かつらぎ町}}, {{ill|Ito District, Wakayama|ja|伊都郡}}, Wakayama Prefecture. Designated as an Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property of Japan. * {{ill|Suginohara Onta-mai|ja|杉野原の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Suginohara, {{ill|Aridagawa, Wakayama|ja|有田川町}}, {{ill|Arida District, Wakayama|ja|有田郡}}, Wakayama Prefecture. Designated as an Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property of Japan. * {{ill|Nihiyama Shrine Onta-mai|ja|仁比山神社の御田舞}} - A folk performance from {{ill|Kanzaki, Saga|ja|神埼市}}, Kanzaki Town, Saga Prefecture. Designated as a Prefectural Intangible Cultural Property. See {{ill|Nihiyama Shrine|ja|仁比山神社}}. * {{ill|Azayama Shrine Onta-mai|ja|四阿屋神社の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Kuraue Town, {{ill|Tosu, Saga|ja|鳥栖市}}, Saga Prefecture. Designated as a Prefectural Intangible Cultural Property. See {{ill|Azayama Shrine|ja|四阿屋神社}}.
== See Also == * {{ill|Onta|ja|御田}}, {{ill|Ta-asobi|ja|田遊び}}
{{Ambiguous}}

'''Onta-mai''' (御田舞) * {{ill|Hanazono Onta-mai|ja|花園の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Hanazono Yanase, {{ill|Katsuragi, Wakayama|ja|かつらぎ町}}, {{ill|Ito District, Wakayama|ja|伊都郡}}, Wakayama Prefecture. Designated as an Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property of Japan. * {{ill|Suginohara Onta-mai|ja|杉野原の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Suginohara, {{ill|Aridagawa, Wakayama|ja|有田川町}}, {{ill|Arida District, Wakayama|ja|有田郡}}, Wakayama Prefecture. Designated as an Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property of Japan. * {{ill|Nihiyama Shrine Onta-mai|ja|仁比山神社の御田舞}} - A folk performance from {{ill|Kanzaki, Saga|ja|神埼市}}, Kanzaki Town, Saga Prefecture. Designated as a Prefectural Intangible Cultural Property. See {{ill|Nihiyama Shrine|ja|仁比山神社}}. * {{ill|Azayama Shrine Onta-mai|ja|四阿屋神社の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Kuraue Town, {{ill|Tosu, Saga|ja|鳥栖市}}, Saga Prefecture. Designated as a Prefectural Intangible Cultural Property. See {{ill|Azayama Shrine|ja|四阿屋神社}}.== See Also == * {{ill|Onta|ja|御田}}, {{ill|Ta-asobi|ja|田遊び}}

'''Onta-mai''' (御田舞) * {{ill|Hanazono Onta-mai|ja|花園の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Hanazono Yanase, {{ill|Katsuragi, Wakayama|ja|かつらぎ町}}, {{ill|Ito District, Wakayama|ja|伊都郡}}, Wakayama Prefecture. Designated as an Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property of Japan. * {{ill|Suginohara Onta-mai|ja|杉野原の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Suginohara, {{ill|Aridagawa, Wakayama|ja|有田川町}}, {{ill|Arida District, Wakayama|ja|有田郡}}, Wakayama Prefecture. Designated as an Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property of Japan. * {{ill|Nihiyama Shrine Onta-mai|ja|仁比山神社の御田舞}} - A folk performance from {{ill|Kanzaki, Saga|ja|神埼市}}, Kanzaki Town, Saga Prefecture. Designated as a Prefectural Intangible Cultural Property. See {{ill|Nihiyama Shrine|ja|仁比山神社}}. * {{ill|Azayama Shrine Onta-mai|ja|四阿屋神社の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Kuraue Town, {{ill|Tosu, Saga|ja|鳥栖市}}, Saga Prefecture. Designated as a Prefectural Intangible Cultural Property. See {{ill|Azayama Shrine|ja|四阿屋神社}}.== See Also == * {{ill|Onta|ja|御田}}, {{ill|Ta-asobi|ja|田遊び}}
{{Ambiguous}}

revision.text:
'''Onta-mai''' (御田舞) * {{ill|Hanazono Onta-mai|ja|花園の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Hanazono Yanase, {{ill|Katsuragi, Wakayama|ja|かつらぎ町}}, {{ill|Ito District, Wakayama|ja|伊都郡}}, Wakayama Prefecture. Designated as an Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property of Japan. * {{ill|Suginohara Onta-mai|ja|杉野原の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Suginohara, {{ill|Aridagawa, Wakayama|ja|有田川町}}, {{ill|Arida District, Wakayama|ja|有田郡}}, Wakayama Prefecture. Designated as an Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property of Japan. * {{ill|Nihiyama Shrine Onta-mai|ja|仁比山神社の御田舞}} - A folk performance from {{ill|Kanzaki, Saga|ja|神埼市}}, Kanzaki Town, Saga Prefecture. Designated as a Prefectural Intangible Cultural Property. See {{ill|Nihiyama Shrine|ja|仁比山神社}}. * {{ill|Azayama Shrine Onta-mai|ja|四阿屋神社の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Kuraue Town, {{ill|Tosu, Saga|ja|鳥栖市}}, Saga Prefecture. Designated as a Prefectural Intangible Cultural Property. See {{ill|Azayama Shrine|ja|四阿屋神社}}. == See Also! == * {{ill|Onta|ja|御田}}, {{ill|Ta-asobi|ja|田遊び}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "== See Also! ==" to "== See Also =="
revision.text:
'''Onta-mai''' (御田舞) * {{ill|Hanazono Onta-mai|ja|花園の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Hanazono Yanase, {{ill|Katsuragi, Wakayama|ja|かつらぎ町}}, {{ill|Ito District, Wakayama|ja|伊都郡}}, Wakayama Prefecture. Designated as an Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property of Japan. * {{ill|Suginohara Onta-mai|ja|杉野原の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Suginohara, {{ill|Aridagawa, Wakayama|ja|有田川町}}, {{ill|Arida District, Wakayama|ja|有田郡}}, Wakayama Prefecture. Designated as an Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property of Japan. * {{ill|Nihiyama Shrine Onta-mai|ja|仁比山神社の御田舞}} - A folk performance from {{ill|Kanzaki, Saga|ja|神埼市}}, Kanzaki Town, Saga Prefecture. Designated as a Prefectural Intangible Cultural Property. See {{ill|Nihiyama Shrine|ja|仁比山神社}}. * {{ill|Azayama Shrine Onta-mai|ja|四阿屋神社の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Kuraue Town, {{ill|Tosu, Saga|ja|鳥栖市}}, Saga Prefecture. Designated as a Prefectural Intangible Cultural Property. See {{ill|Azayama Shrine|ja|四阿屋神社}}. == See Also == * {{ill|Onta|ja|御田}}, {{ill|Ta-asobi|ja|田遊び}}
{{Ambiguous}}

'''Onta-mai''' (御田舞) * {{ill|Hanazono Onta-mai|ja|花園の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Hanazono Yanase, {{ill|Katsuragi, Wakayama|ja|かつらぎ町}}, {{ill|Ito District, Wakayama|ja|伊都郡}}, Wakayama Prefecture. Designated as an Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property of Japan. * {{ill|Suginohara Onta-mai|ja|杉野原の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Suginohara, {{ill|Aridagawa, Wakayama|ja|有田川町}}, {{ill|Arida District, Wakayama|ja|有田郡}}, Wakayama Prefecture. Designated as an Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property of Japan. * {{ill|Nihiyama Shrine Onta-mai|ja|仁比山神社の御田舞}} - A folk performance from {{ill|Kanzaki, Saga|ja|神埼市}}, Kanzaki Town, Saga Prefecture. Designated as a Prefectural Intangible Cultural Property. See {{ill|Nihiyama Shrine|ja|仁比山神社}}. * {{ill|Azayama Shrine Onta-mai|ja|四阿屋神社の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Kuraue Town, {{ill|Tosu, Saga|ja|鳥栖市}}, Saga Prefecture. Designated as a Prefectural Intangible Cultural Property. See {{ill|Azayama Shrine|ja|四阿屋神社}}. == See Also == * {{ill|Onta|ja|御田}}, {{ill|Ta-asobi|ja|田遊び}}

'''Onta-mai''' (御田舞) * {{ill|Hanazono Onta-mai|ja|花園の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Hanazono Yanase, {{ill|Katsuragi, Wakayama|ja|かつらぎ町}}, {{ill|Ito District, Wakayama|ja|伊都郡}}, Wakayama Prefecture. Designated as an Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property of Japan. * {{ill|Suginohara Onta-mai|ja|杉野原の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Suginohara, {{ill|Aridagawa, Wakayama|ja|有田川町}}, {{ill|Arida District, Wakayama|ja|有田郡}}, Wakayama Prefecture. Designated as an Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property of Japan. * {{ill|Nihiyama Shrine Onta-mai|ja|仁比山神社の御田舞}} - A folk performance from {{ill|Kanzaki, Saga|ja|神埼市}}, Kanzaki Town, Saga Prefecture. Designated as a Prefectural Intangible Cultural Property. See {{ill|Nihiyama Shrine|ja|仁比山神社}}. * {{ill|Azayama Shrine Onta-mai|ja|四阿屋神社の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Kuraue Town, {{ill|Tosu, Saga|ja|鳥栖市}}, Saga Prefecture. Designated as a Prefectural Intangible Cultural Property. See {{ill|Azayama Shrine|ja|四阿屋神社}}. == See Also == * {{ill|Onta|ja|御田}}, {{ill|Ta-asobi|ja|田遊び}}

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]][[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]][[Category:qq]] on (CatAlot)
revision.text:
'''Onta-mai''' (御田舞) * {{ill|Hanazono Onta-mai|ja|花園の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Hanazono Yanase, {{ill|Katsuragi, Wakayama|ja|かつらぎ町}}, {{ill|Ito District, Wakayama|ja|伊都郡}}, Wakayama Prefecture. Designated as an Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property of Japan. * {{ill|Suginohara Onta-mai|ja|杉野原の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Suginohara, {{ill|Aridagawa, Wakayama|ja|有田川町}}, {{ill|Arida District, Wakayama|ja|有田郡}}, Wakayama Prefecture. Designated as an Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property of Japan. * {{ill|Nihiyama Shrine Onta-mai|ja|仁比山神社の御田舞}} - A folk performance from {{ill|Kanzaki, Saga|ja|神埼市}}, Kanzaki Town, Saga Prefecture. Designated as a Prefectural Intangible Cultural Property. See {{ill|Nihiyama Shrine|ja|仁比山神社}}. * {{ill|Azayama Shrine Onta-mai|ja|四阿屋神社の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Kuraue Town, {{ill|Tosu, Saga|ja|鳥栖市}}, Saga Prefecture. Designated as a Prefectural Intangible Cultural Property. See {{ill|Azayama Shrine|ja|四阿屋神社}}. == See Also == * {{ill|Onta|ja|御田}}, {{ill|Ta-asobi|ja|田遊び}}
{{Ambiguous}}

revision.text:
'''Onta-mai''' (御田舞) * {{ill|Hanazono Onta-mai|ja|花園の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Hanazono Yanase, {{ill|Katsuragi, Wakayama|ja|かつらぎ町}}, {{ill|Ito District, Wakayama|ja|伊都郡}}, Wakayama Prefecture. Designated as an Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property of Japan. * {{ill|Suginohara Onta-mai|ja|杉野原の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Suginohara, {{ill|Aridagawa, Wakayama|ja|有田川町}}, {{ill|Arida District, Wakayama|ja|有田郡}}, Wakayama Prefecture. Designated as an Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property of Japan. * {{ill|Nihiyama Shrine Onta-mai|ja|仁比山神社の御田舞}} - A folk performance from {{ill|Kanzaki, Saga|ja|神埼市}}, Kanzaki Town, Saga Prefecture. Designated as a Prefectural Intangible Cultural Property. See {{ill|Nihiyama Shrine|ja|仁比山神社}}. * {{ill|Azayama Shrine Onta-mai|ja|四阿屋神社の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Kuraue Town, {{ill|Tosu, Saga|ja|鳥栖市}}, Saga Prefecture. Designated as a Prefectural Intangible Cultural Property. See {{ill|Azayama Shrine|ja|四阿屋神社}}. == See Also == * {{ill|Onta|ja|御田}}, {{ill|Ta-asobi|ja|田遊び}}
{{Ambiguous}}

revision.text:
'''Onta-mai''' (御田舞) * {{ill|Hanazono Onta-mai|ja|花園の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Hanazono Yanase, {{ill|Katsuragi, Wakayama|ja|かつらぎ町}}, {{ill|Ito District, Wakayama|ja|伊都郡}}, Wakayama Prefecture. Designated as an Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property of Japan. * {{ill|Suginohara Onta-mai|ja|杉野原の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Suginohara, {{ill|Aridagawa, Wakayama|ja|有田川町}}, {{ill|Arida District, Wakayama|ja|有田郡}}, Wakayama Prefecture. Designated as an Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property of Japan. * {{ill|Nihiyama Shrine Onta-mai|ja|仁比山神社の御田舞}} - A folk performance from {{ill|Kanzaki, Saga|ja|神埼市}}, Kanzaki Town, Saga Prefecture. Designated as a Prefectural Intangible Cultural Property. See {{ill|Nihiyama Shrine|ja|仁比山神社}}. * {{ill|Azayama Shrine Onta-mai|ja|四阿屋神社の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Kuraue Town, {{ill|Tosu, Saga|ja|鳥栖市}}, Saga Prefecture. Designated as a Prefectural Intangible Cultural Property. See {{ill|Azayama Shrine|ja|四阿屋神社}}. == See Also == * {{ill|Onta|ja|御田}}, {{ill|Ta-asobi|ja|田遊び}}
{{Ambiguous}}

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
revision.text:
'''Onta-mai''' (御田舞) * {{ill|Hanazono Onta-mai|ja|花園の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Hanazono Yanase, {{ill|Katsuragi, Wakayama|ja|かつらぎ町}}, {{ill|Ito District, Wakayama|ja|伊都郡}}, Wakayama Prefecture. Designated as an Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property of Japan. * {{ill|Suginohara Onta-mai|ja|杉野原の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Suginohara, {{ill|Aridagawa, Wakayama|ja|有田川町}}, {{ill|Arida District, Wakayama|ja|有田郡}}, Wakayama Prefecture. Designated as an Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property of Japan. * {{ill|Nihiyama Shrine Onta-mai|ja|仁比山神社の御田舞}} - A folk performance from {{ill|Kanzaki, Saga|ja|神埼市}}, Kanzaki Town, Saga Prefecture. Designated as a Prefectural Intangible Cultural Property. See {{ill|Nihiyama Shrine|ja|仁比山神社}}. * {{ill|Azayama Shrine Onta-mai|ja|四阿屋神社の御田舞}} - A folk performance from Kuraue Town, {{ill|Tosu, Saga|ja|鳥栖市}}, Saga Prefecture. Designated as a Prefectural Intangible Cultural Property. See {{ill|Azayama Shrine|ja|四阿屋神社}}. == See Also == * {{ill|Onta|ja|御田}}, {{ill|Ta-asobi|ja|田遊び}}
{{Ambiguous}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:御田舞]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:御田舞]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:御田舞]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11489227]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:50, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Onta-mai''' (御田舞) * {{ill|Hanazono Onta-mai|ja|花園の御田舞|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanazono Onta-mai|qq=}} - A folk performance from Hanazono Yanase, {{ill|Katsuragi, Wakayama|en|Katsuragi, Wakayama|WD=Q1345594|lt=Katsuragi, Wakayama}}, {{ill|Ito District, Wakayama|en|Ito District, Wakayama|WD=Q1131309|lt=Ito District, Wakayama}}, Wakayama Prefecture. Designated as an Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property of Japan. * {{ill|Suginohara Onta-mai|ja|杉野原の御田舞|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suginohara Onta-mai|qq=}} - A folk performance from Suginohara, {{ill|Aridagawa, Wakayama|en|Aridagawa, Wakayama|WD=Q1345889|lt=Aridagawa, Wakayama}}, {{ill|Arida District, Wakayama|en|Arida District, Wakayama|WD=Q1131181|lt=Arida District, Wakayama}}, Wakayama Prefecture. Designated as an Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property of Japan. * {{ill|Nihiyama Shrine Onta-mai|ja|仁比山神社の御田舞|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nihiyama Shrine Onta-mai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A folk performance from {{ill|Kanzaki, Saga|en|Kanzaki, Saga|WD=Q990392|lt=Kanzaki, Saga}}, Kanzaki Town, Saga Prefecture. Designated as a Prefectural Intangible Cultural Property. See {{ill|Niiyama Shrine|lt=Niiyama Shrine|lt=Nihiyama Shrine|ja|仁比山神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nihiyama Shrine|qq=}}. * {{ill|Azayama Shrine Onta-mai|ja|四阿屋神社の御田舞|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Azayama Shrine Onta-mai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A folk performance from Kuraue Town, {{ill|Tosu, Saga|en|Tosu, Saga|WD=Q860674|lt=Tosu, Saga}}, Saga Prefecture. Designated as a Prefectural Intangible Cultural Property. See {{ill|Azayama Shrine|ja|四阿屋神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Azayama Shrine|qq=}}. == See Also == * {{ill|Onta|ja|御田|1=Sacred rice field|1=Sacred rice field|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onta|13=User:Immanuelle/Sacred rice field|qq=}}, {{ill|Ta-asobi|ja|田遊び|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ta-asobi|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:御田舞]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:御田舞]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:御田舞]]
'''Onta-mai''' (御田舞) * {{ill|Hanazono Onta-mai|ja|花園の御田舞|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanazono Onta-mai|qq=}} - A folk performance from Hanazono Yanase, {{ill|Katsuragi, Wakayama|en|Katsuragi, Wakayama|WD=Q1345594|lt=Katsuragi, Wakayama|1=Katsuragi, Wakayama}}, {{ill|Ito District, Wakayama|en|Ito District, Wakayama|WD=Q1131309|lt=Ito District, Wakayama|1=Ito District, Wakayama}}, Wakayama Prefecture. Designated as an Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property of Japan. * {{ill|Suginohara Onta-mai|ja|杉野原の御田舞|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suginohara Onta-mai|qq=}} - A folk performance from Suginohara, {{ill|Aridagawa, Wakayama|en|Aridagawa, Wakayama|WD=Q1345889|lt=Aridagawa, Wakayama|1=Aridagawa, Wakayama}}, {{ill|Arida District, Wakayama|en|Arida District, Wakayama|WD=Q1131181|lt=Arida District, Wakayama|1=Arida District, Wakayama}}, Wakayama Prefecture. Designated as an Important Intangible Folk Cultural Property of Japan. * {{ill|Nihiyama Shrine Onta-mai|ja|仁比山神社の御田舞|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nihiyama Shrine Onta-mai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A folk performance from {{ill|Kanzaki, Saga|en|Kanzaki, Saga|WD=Q990392|lt=Kanzaki, Saga|1=Kanzaki, Saga}}, Kanzaki Town, Saga Prefecture. Designated as a Prefectural Intangible Cultural Property. See {{ill|Niiyama Shrine|lt=Niiyama Shrine|lt=Nihiyama Shrine|ja|仁比山神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nihiyama Shrine|qq=}}. * {{ill|Azayama Shrine Onta-mai|ja|四阿屋神社の御田舞|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Azayama Shrine Onta-mai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - A folk performance from Kuraue Town, {{ill|Tosu, Saga|en|Tosu, Saga|WD=Q860674|lt=Tosu, Saga|1=Tosu, Saga}}, Saga Prefecture. Designated as a Prefectural Intangible Cultural Property. See {{ill|Azayama Shrine|ja|四阿屋神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Azayama Shrine|qq=}}. == See Also == * {{ill|Onta|ja|御田|1=Sacred rice field|1=Sacred rice field|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onta|13=User:Immanuelle/Sacred rice field|qq=}}, {{ill|Ta-asobi|ja|田遊び|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ta-asobi|qq=}}
